headline: Global Water Awards 2026: Voting Opens as Full Shortlist Is Revealed
summary: OXFORD, United Kingdom, March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global Water Intelligence (GWI) today opens voting for the 2026 Global Water Awards, revealing the full shortlist across 14 categories. Now in their 21st year, the Global Water Awards recognise true excellence amongst the companies, projects, and organisations that made the greatest contribution to the international water sector in 2025. This year the awards will feature a brand-new category: AI Project of the Year, with nominees includi
